rules.rule_text:
title: Broomstick POST request
id: 299ad6d6-bce9-496d-ae6d-472f0b7360ef
description: Detects POST request to /api/connectivity
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Robin Hellsten
references:
- https://hunt.io/blog/a-simple-approach-to-discovering-oyster-backdoor-infrastructure
- https://www.threatdown.com/blog/rhysida-using-oyster-backdoor-to-deliver-ransomware
- 0a7fd836d36ed8e8e9aa7bc41fdc9242333e8469059dec8886b7d935f3651679
date: 2024-07-26
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    cs-uri: /api/connectivity
    cs-method: POST
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- POST requests to the same URL, but not from the ransomware
level: high
